prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: TWL-BSSSKP325LBSBS50FT-BUN-50PK-BLCK-4 Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Black Sleeved Spectra Survival Kevlar Paracord 50 ft. - Great Breaking Strength Description: ASR Tactical Sleeved Spectra Utility Cord is rated with a 325lbs tensile strength and a breaking strength of 200lbs. It is constructed of a Spectra base with a polyester braided outer sleeve for UV and abrasion resistance.

Spectra rope is a ultra high molecular weight polyethylene which means thermoplastic polyethylene. This thermoplastic has the highest impact strength presently made and available for consumer applications.

Great for sports and outdoors applications; often used for specialty sport fishing line use.

Weighing in at less than an ounce per 25", this cord is perfect for survival kits, bug out bags, or outdoor recreation. Search Terms: every day carry edc kevlar trip line booby trap signaling device tactical bug out bag survival cord kite braided spear fishing Features: - HIGH YIELD STRENGTH - Utility cord has tensile strength of 325 pounds; Breaking strength: 200 pounds - CUT RESISTANT - Sleeved spectra is highly resistant to cutting, friction, and high temperatures - BRAIDED OUTER SLEEVE- Braided polyester sleeve adds extra durability and helps to prevent unraveling - VERSATILE APPLICATION - High yield strength, cut resistant core, heat resistance, and braided exterior make this an ideal product for sports, camping, and survival application - SPECIFICATIONS - Length: up to 500 Feet, Diameter: 0.075 Inches, MADE IN THE USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical Black 50 ft Sleeved Spectra Paracord

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 50-ft Black Sleeved Spectra Survival Cord

anthropic.title_differentiation: 325 Lbs Tensile Strength, Cut Resistant, UV Resistant, Braided Polyester Sleeve, USA Made

openai.title_differentiation: 325 Lb Tensile Strength, Cut Resistant Spectra Core, UV Resistant Polyester Sleeve, Lightweight EDC And Survival Use
